brief_html: On failure, Product is 0. On success, this is equal to the requested Product.
format:
(UINT32) Product

If Product is nonzero:
(UINT32) Version byte
remarks_html:
On failure, Product is 0. On success, this is equal to the requested Product.

If Product is 0, the Version byte UINT32 is not included in the message.

See the BNLS Product Codes document for a list of valid product codes.

comments.content_html: Idea: return the requested product code in the version byte field if the returned product value is 0 (failure). This way failed requests can be matched to their requested products.
